v1.0.1.description:
Initial Release of the Dawnsbury Days Archipelago mod.

To install the Archipelago world, double download and double click the dawnsbury.apworld file. Only the person running the archipelago server needs to do this. For convenience, I've attached a copy of the player options template file as well, but you can also just generate this with archipelago.

To install the game mod, extract DawnsburyDays_Mod.zip and put its contents in the CustomMods folder inside of your Dawnsbury Days game folder. Or, download the mod from the steam workshop instead.
v1.0.1.title: Initial Release

v1.1.description:
v1.1 Release Changes:
- Fixed 0harmony.dll conflict with other mods that use it.
- Added encounter randomization difficulty option (so you don't fight the final boss first, unless you want to)
- Added server/client version checking (it will give you a warning if they are different)

To install the Archipelago world, double download and double click the dawnsbury.apworld file. Only the person running the archipelago server needs to do this. For convenience, I've attached a copy of the player options template file as well, but you can also just generate this with archipelago.

To install the game mod, extract DawnsburyDays_Mod.zip and put its contents in the CustomMods folder inside of your Dawnsbury Days game folder. Or, download the mod from the steam workshop instead.
v1.1.title: v1.1 Release

v1.1.1.description: Updating the mod to make it compatible with the game's new .NET and harmony versions.
v1.1.1.title: v1.1.1: .NET Hotfix
